Chart-1.$description: Use for the first data series in charts, graphs, and data visualization components.

Chart-2.$description: Use for the second data series in multi-series charts and graphs.

Chart-3.$description: Use for the third data series in multi-series charts and graphs.

Chart-4.$description: Use for the fourth data series in charts, or to represent caution-level data.

Chart-5.$description: Use for the fifth data series or supplementary data in charts and graphs.

Black.$description: Use as a semi-transparent dark scrim behind modals, drawers, and tooltips.

White.$description: Use as a semi-transparent light shimmer on dark surfaces or glassmorphism layers.

Black 70%.$description: Use as a semi-transparent dark scrim behind modals, drawers, and tooltips.
